hypothesis: The 37-record ExECT S0/S1 label-policy regression slice on Qwen3.6:35b replays canonical failure clusters (JME seizure surfaces, diagnosis co-list, medication evidence) frozen under GPT v4.10 without changing scorer semantics.
metric_caveats: This 37-record label-policy regression slice uses record_ids from data/fixtures/exect_s0_label_policy_error_regression_slice.json.
These are partial ExECT S0/S1 diagnostics, not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
Do not extrapolate slice metrics to full-validation performance.
Do not compare this run to GPT slice gates or full validation as the same experiment.
This config intentionally avoids ChainOfThought, BootstrapFewShot, and GEPA per docs/qwen_dspy_latency_policy.md.
Record local Ollama GPU residency or RAM offload when inspecting artifacts.
Deterministic benchmark bridges may repair fused seizure phrases or diagnosis uncertainty; report bridge flags separately when inspecting artifacts.
